name: kaigaiq
description: KaigaiQ - 海外ナイトワーク求人ポータル

scripts.build: npm run minify-css && npm run minify-js
scripts.minify-css: cleancss -o dist/style.min.css style.css && cleancss -o dist/shop.min.css shop.css && cleancss -o dist/news.min.css news.css
scripts.minify-js: terser script.js -o dist/script.min.js --compress --mangle && terser shop.js -o dist/shop.min.js --compress --mangle && terser news.js -o dist/news.min.js --compress --mangle && terser sw.js -o dist/sw.min.js --compress --mangle
